title: Vanilla Expansion
description: Adds a custom tool tier and a unique Paxel item that can be crafted from materials gathered from all over your minecraft world, Backpacks and magnets!
body:
This mod addes several features and items that improve gameplay for survival and ease of use.
- Steel tools - greater than netherite but significantly expensive to craft costing 8 coal and 1 iron per ingot.
- Paxel - Custom design and made from items found all over the overworld and nether with unique cores to craft.
- Element cores - used to craft the paxel and in future to add tool modifiers for steel tools e.g. smelting.
- Magnet - pulls items to the player and currently still WIP.
- Backpack - adds either a signle chest storage or double chest WIP as no keybinds to open the inventory asside from placing the backpack or opening by left clicking in main hand.1
- Vein Mining 
- Dragons based on element cores.
- More features coming soon...
